purpose: Deterministic MIDI and Live-build plans for standalone downtempo punk-bluegrass tracks.
ableton_import_notes: Create or open a Live 12 session from automation/live12-session-template.json.
Drag each .mid file into Live and route generated MIDI tracks to matching session tracks.
Replace GM placeholder sounds with the documented Ableton/Arturia instruments only after license verification.
Use composition_mutation_blueprint for per-track role jobs, mutation lanes, and section-level review targets.
Use Max for Live device contracts in each plan as the automation target list.

composition_mutation_blueprint.title: Good Vibrations in a Burned Barn
composition_mutation_blueprint.hook_thesis: A controller-banjo forward roll behaves like a modular pop hook while the room collapses into a barn-fire punk refrain.
composition_mutation_blueprint.testable_appeal_hypothesis: Hypothesis: repeated bright banjo cells, delayed fiddle answers, and a late four-on-floor entrance will improve recall without making the track feel polished.

traditional_role_jobs.aeroband_banjo_lead: Play the lead hook as Brian Wilson-style cell repetition, with velocity changes preserved from the controller.
traditional_role_jobs.fiddle_hybrid_strings: Answer the hook with long mixolydian drones and bowed lift into the chorus.
traditional_role_jobs.mandolin_chop: Provide offbeat lift on beats two and four, then thin out during the half-time break.
traditional_role_jobs.dobro_metallic_slide: Enter as a bent harmony shadow after the first house-kick arrival.
traditional_role_jobs.acoustic_guitar_boom_chuck: Hold the dry barn-floor rhythm bed under the banjo without masking the roll.
traditional_role_jobs.upright_bass_sub: Double root and fifth movement with low-end restraint and sidechain headroom.

alien_role_jobs.deep_house_machines: Delay the kick entrance so the house grid feels earned, then lock the mandolin chop to it.
alien_role_jobs.alien_sky: Granularly smear fiddle answers into a wide freeze bloom after the fourth section.
alien_role_jobs.public_domain_source_deck: Prefer old-time reel and hornpipe candidates for micro-slices only after provenance approval.

punk_role_jobs.punk_kit: Use dry snare hits and a half-time break rather than cinematic drum programming.
punk_role_jobs.performance_rule: Keep one lead-controller take with audible risk before comping.
punk_role_jobs.anti_polish_rule: Leave a controlled edge on pick noise, snare room, and final chorus crowd response.

source_deck_plan.candidate_strategy: Use generated source candidates for rhythmic DNA and do not expose raw local sample paths.
source_deck_plan.credit_policy: Carry Citizen DJ / Library of Congress credit into release notes if any source deck slice is unmuted.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Map controller gestures into banjo-like pluck articulation.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: velocity_curve rises from intimate verse to shouted chorus.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Keep the roll varied without erasing the hook.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: roll_density increases at each chorus return.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Open the final chorus into an alien stereo field.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: width and freeze rise only after the half-time break.

section_blueprints.mutation_focus: source deck stays muted while alien sky establishes dust
house kick enters under mandolin chop
spatial harmonic field and granular tails
punk kit and half-time dry room
source deck slices only after review

production_constraints: Import MIDI into Ableton Live 12, then map each MIDI track to the matching session-template track.
Keep Public Domain Source Deck muted until the source ledger approves the selected audio.
Do not commit rendered audio, .als, .amxd, commercial packs, samples, presets, or controller recordings.
Before Live-set mutation, save a local rollback copy and record the affected tracks/devices.

composition_mutation_blueprint.title: A.P. Carter in the Warehouse
composition_mutation_blueprint.hook_thesis: A plainspoken dobro hook moves like a Carter Family melody inside a slow warehouse kick and dub-return system.
composition_mutation_blueprint.testable_appeal_hypothesis: Hypothesis: sparse narrative phrasing plus call-response stabs will feel intimate while the low-passed house pulse keeps bodies moving.

traditional_role_jobs.aeroband_banjo_lead: Answer the dobro hook with restrained banjo imitation rather than constant roll density.
traditional_role_jobs.fiddle_hybrid_strings: Provide tremolo tension behind the bridge and soften the final return.
traditional_role_jobs.mandolin_chop: Mark the warehouse backbeat with dry offbeat punctuation.
traditional_role_jobs.dobro_metallic_slide: Carry the lead thesis through bends, slides, and chorus pickups.
traditional_role_jobs.acoustic_guitar_boom_chuck: Keep boom-chuck phrasing plain and narrative, close to the vocal pocket.
traditional_role_jobs.upright_bass_sub: Bridge acoustic root movement into deep-house sub without busy passing tones.

alien_role_jobs.deep_house_machines: Use low-passed stabs as the answering voice to banjo and dobro.
alien_role_jobs.alien_sky: Reserve reverse granular tails for the stripped bridge.
alien_role_jobs.public_domain_source_deck: Prefer ballad-contour candidates only after provenance review.

punk_role_jobs.punk_kit: Crush the room in the bridge but avoid festival-rock polish.
punk_role_jobs.performance_rule: Keep the topline phrasing plain, close, and under-edited.
punk_role_jobs.anti_polish_rule: Let warehouse noise and imperfect slide attacks remain audible.

source_deck_plan.candidate_strategy: Use source candidates for contour reference, not as full-song substitution.
source_deck_plan.credit_policy: Credit Citizen DJ / Library of Congress if source deck audio is used.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Route banjo, fiddle, and stab answers around the dobro thesis.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: answer density drops in the bridge then doubles at the return.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Keep the warehouse pulse slow but locked.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: swing and accent rise through the second half.

production_constraints: Import MIDI into Ableton Live 12, then map each MIDI track to the matching session-template track.
Keep Public Domain Source Deck muted until the source ledger approves the selected audio.
Do not commit rendered audio, .als, .amxd, commercial packs, samples, presets, or controller recordings.

composition_mutation_blueprint.title: No Gods, No Masters, No Quantize
composition_mutation_blueprint.hook_thesis: Fast banjo, abrupt punk stops, and a shadow acid line argue with the grid instead of obeying it.
composition_mutation_blueprint.testable_appeal_hypothesis: Hypothesis: slight timing friction between human roll and locked kick will create attention without collapsing danceability.

traditional_role_jobs.aeroband_banjo_lead: Lead with fast roll language and preserve unquantized attack variance.
traditional_role_jobs.fiddle_hybrid_strings: Use double-stops as stop-time exclamation points.
traditional_role_jobs.mandolin_chop: Cut through with clipped offbeats and ghost-note pressure.
traditional_role_jobs.dobro_metallic_slide: Add short metallic answers after abrupt stops.
traditional_role_jobs.acoustic_guitar_boom_chuck: Reinforce the anti-polish pulse with aggressive downstrokes.
traditional_role_jobs.upright_bass_sub: Mirror roots while the acid shadow threatens chromatic motion.

alien_role_jobs.deep_house_machines: Lock kick and acid-shadow stabs after the banjo establishes human drift.
alien_role_jobs.alien_sky: Use spectral freeze only as a stop-time punctuation device.
alien_role_jobs.public_domain_source_deck: Prefer reel and hornpipe candidates for transient chop studies after approval.

punk_role_jobs.punk_kit: Favor raw kit stops and short fills over smooth transitions.
punk_role_jobs.performance_rule: Do not quantize the opening banjo count-off.
punk_role_jobs.anti_polish_rule: Keep abrupt gaps and rough cadence as structural features.

source_deck_plan.candidate_strategy: Use source candidates as transient vocabulary after ledger and credit checks.
source_deck_plan.credit_policy: Credit Citizen DJ / Library of Congress in any released source-use notes.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Prevent chop drift from hiding the intentionally unquantized banjo.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: tighten only when kick and mandolin need to lock.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Limit low-end chaos while the acid shadow pushes flat-seven pressure.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: root constraint stays strong during stop-time choruses.

production_constraints: Import MIDI into Ableton Live 12, then map each MIDI track to the matching session-template track.

Do not commit rendered audio, .als, .amxd, commercial packs, samples, presets, or controller recordings.

composition_mutation_blueprint.title: Possum Kingdom Afterhours
composition_mutation_blueprint.hook_thesis: A slow modal fiddle place-study becomes dub-techno bluegrass afterhours without losing one-take lead risk.
composition_mutation_blueprint.testable_appeal_hypothesis: Hypothesis: low tempo, modal repetition, and long spatial fade will create sustained immersion while feedback edges keep the track from becoming ambient wallpaper.

traditional_role_jobs.aeroband_banjo_lead: Use harmonics and sparse roll fragments rather than lead runs.
traditional_role_jobs.fiddle_hybrid_strings: Own the modal identity with bowed place-setting drones.
traditional_role_jobs.mandolin_chop: Enter rarely as a dry pulse marker against dub chords.
traditional_role_jobs.dobro_metallic_slide: Swell into chorus spaces and answer the fiddle without stealing focus.
traditional_role_jobs.acoustic_guitar_boom_chuck: Keep a low, brushed rhythm bed under the dub-techno chord movement.
traditional_role_jobs.upright_bass_sub: Hold root gravity and sub drone with strict mono discipline.

alien_role_jobs.deep_house_machines: Use slow dub-techno chords, restrained hats, and deep sidechain rather than peak-time programming.
alien_role_jobs.alien_sky: Turn banjo harmonics into granular particles and long spatial fade.
alien_role_jobs.public_domain_source_deck: Prefer hornpipe contour candidates for distant counter-lines after approval.

punk_role_jobs.punk_kit: Use brush kit and feedback edges instead of glossy breakdowns.
punk_role_jobs.performance_rule: Keep a one-take lead rule for the primary controller pass.
punk_role_jobs.anti_polish_rule: No cinematic riser before the chorus; let the swell stay handmade.

source_deck_plan.candidate_strategy: Use source candidates as quiet contour ghosts only after provenance review.
source_deck_plan.credit_policy: Carry Citizen DJ / Library of Congress credit if any approved source appears.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Move drones and harmonics through a spatial field without masking low end.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: azimuth and width drift slowly across the full arrangement.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Gate any historical fragments behind ledger-backed approval.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: slice_index remains inactive until human review unmute.

composition_mutation_blueprint.title: The Ballad of the Broken Controller
composition_mutation_blueprint.hook_thesis: Controller failure becomes the hook when bluegrass instruments, glitch percussion, and a synthetic choir refuse to hide the mistake.
composition_mutation_blueprint.testable_appeal_hypothesis: Hypothesis: audible failure framed as rhythm will increase memorability while the full acoustic stack keeps the song grounded.

traditional_role_jobs.aeroband_banjo_lead: Let calibration noise and controller slips shape the lead riff.
traditional_role_jobs.fiddle_hybrid_strings: Saw into the refrain with raw support rather than clean string pads.
traditional_role_jobs.mandolin_chop: Use tremolo lift to make the refrain feel communal.
traditional_role_jobs.dobro_metallic_slide: Bend around failed notes and make recovery audible.
traditional_role_jobs.acoustic_guitar_boom_chuck: Anchor the refrain with short, loud strums.
traditional_role_jobs.upright_bass_sub: Use slap-like attacks against the glitch rhythm without overloading the sub.

alien_role_jobs.deep_house_machines: Convert controller errors into glitch percussion while preserving the banjo riff.
alien_role_jobs.alien_sky: Stack a wide synthetic choir behind the last refrain.
alien_role_jobs.public_domain_source_deck: Use approved source candidates only as texture behind the failure motif.

punk_role_jobs.punk_kit: Make the refrain short, loud, and physically clipped.
punk_role_jobs.performance_rule: Retain at least one failed controller event as a documented hook element.
punk_role_jobs.anti_polish_rule: Do not smooth every pitch bend or MIDI mistrigger.

source_deck_plan.candidate_strategy: Keep public-domain fragments secondary to the controller-failure hook.
source_deck_plan.credit_policy: Credit Citizen DJ / Library of Congress if any source deck layer is active.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Translate controller instability into playable banjo articulation.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: humanize_ms increases during failure-reveal sections.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Answer controller mistakes with bounded punk fills.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: fill_probability spikes at breakdown and final refrain.

composition_mutation_blueprint.title: Rail Yard Ghost in the Control Room
composition_mutation_blueprint.hook_thesis: The full system test: AeroBand banjo, every bluegrass support voice, public-domain stutters, and all Max for Live devices move through a controlled rail-yard ghost story.
composition_mutation_blueprint.testable_appeal_hypothesis: Hypothesis: complete-stack orchestration with bounded device mutation will create the strongest tactile performance identity while preserving provenance safety.

traditional_role_jobs.aeroband_banjo_lead: Lead the whole arrangement with controller-banjo calibration, forward-roll hook, and one-take risk.
traditional_role_jobs.fiddle_hybrid_strings: Answer the hook in orbiting phrases and widen into spectral bloom.
traditional_role_jobs.mandolin_chop: Lock the chop to house hats while keeping the bluegrass pulse readable.
traditional_role_jobs.dobro_metallic_slide: Swell around the hook as a haunted steel counter-line.
traditional_role_jobs.acoustic_guitar_boom_chuck: Bind the rail-yard rhythm bed with dry strums and call-response support.
traditional_role_jobs.upright_bass_sub: Keep bass and sub under strict root-motion and headroom limits.

alien_role_jobs.deep_house_machines: Run the four-on-floor grid, hats, and stabs as the control-room clock.
alien_role_jobs.alien_sky: Bloom the final sections with spatial freeze and spectral harmonic motion.
alien_role_jobs.public_domain_source_deck: Use approved source stutters as historical ghosts only after ledger-backed review.

punk_role_jobs.punk_kit: Use bounded fills and a short loud refrain without smoothing the outro.
punk_role_jobs.performance_rule: Keep the lead controller risk audible across the final pass.
punk_role_jobs.anti_polish_rule: No glossy outro; stop with a rollback-safe one-take edge.

source_deck_plan.candidate_strategy: Use generated candidates as stutters and call-response ghosts only after source IDs are verified in the ledger.
source_deck_plan.credit_policy: Carry Citizen DJ / Library of Congress credit lines into any release notes.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Translate AeroBand controller data into banjo articulation.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: velocity_curve and humanize_ms follow the performer risk arc.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Vary forward-roll density without losing the hook.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: roll_density rises through each return.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Route fiddle, guitar, and dobro answers around the banjo hook.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: answer density follows scene energy.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Keep chop timing locked to the house grid.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: chop_gate tightens at grid entrances.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Shape metallic slide phrases into haunted counter-lines.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: glide_time and feedback rise in chorus swells.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Protect low-end mono and root movement.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: sidechain_depth stays strongest under kick-heavy scenes.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Generate bounded fills without derailing the arrangement.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: fill_probability spikes before short loud refrains.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Conduct kick, hats, stabs, and swing as the control-room clock.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: swing_amount and accent rise once the hook is established.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Keep public-domain stutters gated by provenance checks.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: slice_index remains inactive until review, then uses short stutters.

mutation_lanes.musical_purpose: Bloom the final rail-yard ghost field.
mutation_lanes.automation_shape: width, azimuth, grain_density, and freeze expand through the outro.
